languages.text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
For 1 round, the user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus} more levels of toxin and the base damage of the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect is increased by 3 times.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers +{uip|ToxinSelf|b06a441417434f2f9bc6317283920d37} levels of toxin and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

For 1 round, the user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus} more levels of toxin and the base damage of the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect is increased by 3 times.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers +{uip|ToxinSelf|b06a441417434f2f9bc6317283920d37} levels of toxin and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability. On kill, its cooldown is reset.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента получает способность {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Калечащее сближение{/g}.
Она позволяет ему подтянуться к выбранному противнику и атаковать его экипированным оружием ближнего боя.
Убийство врага сбрасывает время восстановления этой способности.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента получает способность {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Калечащее сближение{/g}. Убийство врага сбрасывает время ее восстановления.
Обладатель аугмента получает способность {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Калечащее сближение{/g}. Убийство врага сбрасывает время ее восстановления.

languages.text:
El usuario obtiene la capacidad {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergencia mutiladora{/g}.
Permite al usuario atacar al enemigo objetivo con un arma cuerpo a cuerpo, si tiene una equipada, al ser atraído hacia el enemigo.
Al matar, el tiempo de recuperación de {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergencia mutiladora{/g} se anula.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario obtiene la capacidad {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergencia mutiladora{/g}.
Permite al usuario atacar al enemigo objetivo con un arma cuerpo a cuerpo, si tiene una equipada, al ser atraído hacia el enemigo.
Al matar, el tiempo de recuperación de {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergencia mutiladora{/g} se anula.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer erhält die Fähigkeit {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Verstümmelnde Annäherung{/g}.
Diese ermöglicht dem Nutzer einen Angriff mit einer Nahkampfwaffe (sofern ausgerüstet), nachdem er zum Gegner gezogen wurde.
Tötet er den Gegner, wird {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Verstümmelnde Annäherung{/g} zurückgesetzt.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Yaralayan Kesişim{/g} kabiliyetini kazanır.
Bu kabiliyet sayesinde kullanıcı, yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa hedef düşmana çekildikten sonra bu silahla o düşmana saldırabilir.
Öldürüş hâlinde {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Yaralayan Kesişim{/g} kabiliyetinin dolum süresi sıfırlanır.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Yaralayan Kesişim{/g} kabiliyetini kazanır.
Bu kabiliyet sayesinde kullanıcı, yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa hedef düşmana çekildikten sonra bu silahla o düşmana saldırabilir.
Öldürüş hâlinde {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Yaralayan Kesişim{/g} kabiliyetinin dolum süresi sıfırlanır.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur obtient la capacité {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergence mutilante{/g},
qui lui permet d’attaquer la cible ennemie avec une arme de mêlée s’il en est équipé, après avoir été attiré vers elle.
Le temps de recharge de {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergence mutilante{/g} est réinitialisé lors de l’élimination.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur obtient la capacité {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergence mutilante{/g},
qui lui permet d’attaquer la cible ennemie avec une arme de mêlée s’il en est équipé, après avoir été attiré vers elle.
Le temps de recharge de {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Convergence mutilante{/g} est réinitialisé lors de l’élimination.

languages.text:
使用者获得{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}致残收束{/g}能力。
在使用者被拉向该敌人后，如果使用者装备了近战武器，则会对该敌人发起攻击。
击杀目标后，重置{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}致残收束{/g}冷却时间。
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
使用者获得{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}致残收束{/g}能力。
在使用者被拉向该敌人后，如果使用者装备了近战武器，则会对该敌人发起攻击。
击杀目标后，重置{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}致残收束{/g}冷却时间。

languages.text:
使用者は{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}殺傷収束{/g}アビリティを獲得する。
このアビリティにより、使用者は敵の元へ引き寄せられた後、近接武器を装備していればその対象の敵を攻撃できる。
敵を倒した場合、{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}殺傷収束{/g}のクールダウンがリセットされる。
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.

traits.locale_text:
使用者は{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}殺傷収束{/g}アビリティを獲得する。
このアビリティにより、使用者は敵の元へ引き寄せられた後、近接武器を装備していればその対象の敵を攻撃できる。
敵を倒した場合、{g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}殺傷収束{/g}のクールダウンがリセットされる。
